zh.lifeSummary: 當David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis於1463年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾爾索恩 卡素時，他的父親John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy27歲，母親Elizabeth Montgomery23歲。他於大約1484年與Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis was born in 1463, in Culzean Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, was 27 and his mother, Elizabeth Montgomery, was 23. He married Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick about 1484, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis est né en 1463, à Culzean Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Montgomery, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick environ 1484, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilisが1463年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクウルズエアン カストルで生まれた時，父John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedyは27歳，母Elizabeth Montgomeryは23歳であった。約1484年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックでAgnes William Borthwick of Borthwickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis(이)가 1463년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 컬즈이 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Montgomery(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1484년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Kennedy 3rd Lord Kennedy and 1st Earl of Cassilis родился в 1463 г. в местности кулзин кастл, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Kennedy 2nd Lord Kennedy было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Montgomery, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes William Borthwick of Borthwick около 1484 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

Murió el 9 de septiembre de 1513, en Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
